summary: Renewed attacks in the Persian Gulf lifted oil prices while keeping a lid on stocks and bonds amid mounting concern about the economic fallout of the war-driven spike in energy costs.

title: Bridgepoint Raises €5 Billion for European Direct Lending Fund
summary: Bridgepoint Group Plc is set to raise about €5 billion ($5.8 billion) to target financing opportunities in Europe’s direct lending market, people with knowledge of the matter said.
